executiveSummary: All 5 user stories comply. FR-3 was partially non-compliant (wrong buildPrompt key names, missing current_iteration, no empty-string fallback) and was remediated in this audit by updating src/commands/ideate.ts.

verificationByFR.note: Remediated: ideate.ts now passes { current_iteration, roadmap, project_context } to buildPrompt.

minorObservations: FR-3 key naming mismatch (remediated): original used "ROADMAP.md"/"PROJECT_CONTEXT.md" instead of "roadmap"/"project_context".
current_iteration was missing from prompt context in original implementation.
Absent files were omitted rather than passed as empty strings.
US-004-AC02 and FR-3 have slightly inconsistent wording; future PRD authoring should align AC wording with FR interface contracts.
conclusionsAndRecommendations: Iteration 000032 delivered a complete and working nvst ideate command. The single FR-3 gap has been remediated. No further changes required.

refactorPlan.description: Move readState before file reads; pass { current_iteration, roadmap, project_context } to buildPrompt with empty-string fallbacks.
